ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the publication is open access */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the publication */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* JSON array of funding sources for the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper, technical report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Author's institutional affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* JSON array of the author's research interests */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of authorship in the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the author is the corresponding author */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* JSON object describing the author's contribution to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation record */,
  "citing_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cites another publication */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation is made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the cited publication has been cited by the citing publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with publications */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the keyword has been used in publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the reviewer */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the review is publicly visible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source" TEXT /* Funding source (e.g., NSF, NIH) */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_funding" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_institutions" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "institution_id")
)
